creator: petef@databits.net
text:
ssh-multiadd is a tool to add multiple ssh keys to the ssh authentication
agent.  It's particularly useful because it will only prompt for each
unique passphrase once (e.g. if two keys use the same passphrase, you will 
only enter it once).

Fix: (http://hex.databits.net/~petef/freebsd/ssh-multiadd.shar)
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
